name: charming
description: Create, update, and inspect Charming-hosted interactive web apps from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Build and iterate hosted web apps
interface.longDescription: Charming is an MCP server that generates, hosts, and updates small interactive web apps. Use this plugin to connect the Charming MCP endpoint and follow the Charming authoring workflow from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Build me a personal web app with Charming.
Update my Charming app from feedback.
Connect Charming MCP in this Codex session.
